name: Mexican Max
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Avocado, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a well-greased 8-inch iron skillet or round baking dish with tortillas, leaving 2 inches extending over the top.
2. Heat butter in a saucepan.
3. Saute onion, green pepper, and mushrooms until tender. Sprinkle with salt.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs with sugar for 2 minutes. Beat in flour and baking powder alternately with milk.
5. Fold in saffron, cheddar cheese, and jack cheese.
6. Pour the batter over the sauteed mixture into tortillas, adding cheese batter.
7. Arrange sliced avocado and tomato on top. Fold over tortillas, adding cheese batter.
8. Arrange sliced avocado and tomato on top. Fold over tortillas and hold down with wood picks.
9. Place the sliced cheese over the opening in the center.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes. Cut into 6 wedges and serve immediately.
Makes 6 servings.
